title: Specklinia amaralii
taxonomy: Specklinia amaralii is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid, typically growing in shaded areas with rich soil. The species Specklinia amaralii is classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Epidendreae. Further classification includes the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. Within this subtribe, Specklinia amaralii is placed in the genus Specklinia, which is a small genus of terrestrial orchids.
